workflow.name: Higgins: HTML - render for web & email

parameters.html:
{{ (() => { const email = String($json.userEmail ?? '').trim(); if (!email) return ''; const beforeAt = email.split('@')[0] || ''; const parts = beforeAt.split('.').filter(Boolean); let firstName = parts[0] || 'User'; firstName = firstName.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + firstName.slice(1).toLowerCase(); const esc = (s) => String(s) .replace(/&/g, '&') .replace(//g, '>') .replace(/"/g, '"') .replace(/'/g, '''); return ` ${esc(firstName)} `; })() }}

{{ $json.pageTitle ?? '' }}
Created: {{ $json.jobCreated ?? '' }} Status: {{ $json.jobStatus ?? '' }}

{{ $json.html ?? '' }}
